user_query: I want to surprise my friends with a unique vacation. Can you provide me with the trending search keywords in Brazil and Argentina for the month of September? Additionally, recommend some hotels in these countries for our stay.

TaskList.description: Retrieve the trending search keywords in Brazil for September.
Retrieve the trending search keywords in Argentina for September.
Based on the trending keywords and locations, recommend hotels in Brazil.
Based on the trending keywords and locations, recommend hotels in Argentina.
